svg.text: LED wiring is optional — buttons work without it. LED circuit: 3.3V (Pin 1 or 17) → LED+ · LED− → GND. LEDs are always on. No software changes required.
Note: the 150 Ω resistors are only needed for LED switches WITHOUT a built-in resistor. The Sparkfun and Adafruit metal pushbuttons in the README have one built in — omit the resistors for those.
